title: Declare connect_info: [:user_agent] on channel socket
prompt: Update `lib/my_app_web/endpoint.ex` so the channel socket declaration for `/socket` reads `socket "/socket", MyAppWeb.UserSocket, websocket: [connect_info: [:user_agent]]`. Add this line as the entire contents of the endpoint (minimal endpoint with just the Phoenix.Endpoint use statement, the otp_app, and the socket line).
